title: integer arrays as DPI-C function call arguments

features.name: integer unpacked array as DPI-C open array parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of integer type passed to a DPI-C function that accepts an open array parameter using [] syntax

features.name: DPI-C function import with mixed input/output array parameters
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C function import with both input and output open array parameters using integer unpacked arrays
features.snippet:
import "DPI-C" context function int readFILE(input int fd, output integer dbuf[], input int nbytes, input int offset);
import "DPI-C" context function int writeFILE(input int fd, input integer dbuf[], input int nbytes, input int offset);
